name: Cecep Guozhen Environmental Protection Technology Co.,ltd.
summary: Cecep Guozhen Environmental Protection Technology Co.,ltd. primarily engages in the municipal and industrial wastewater treatment business in China. The company is also involved in the design of wastewater treatment, industrial wastewater, on-site wastewater treatment system, sludge dewatering, and incineration projects, as well as integration and installation of equipment. In addition, it engages in the manufacture and sale of membrane manufacturing equipment; investment and financing services; and pipe network businesses. The company was founded in 2007 and is based in Hefei, China.
